---
title: "Dashboard"
format:
  dashboard:
    expandable: false
---

```{r}
#| message: false
#| warning: false
#| include: false

# install.packages("D:/MDi/Documents/R/package20260206", repos = NULL, type = "source")
# install.packages("tidyverse")
# install.packages("forcats")
# install.packages("bslib")
# install.packages("bsicons")

library(package20260206)
library(tidyverse)
library(plotly)
library(forcats)
library(bslib)
library(bsicons)
library(htmltools)
```

# Overview

```         
(See next tabs)

Dashboard Page
  ├ Overview
  ├ Production
  │ ├ Crude Oil
  │ │ ├ Total
  │ │ ├ (Upgraded Bitumen)
  │ │ ├ C5+
  │ │ ├ Conventional Heavy
  │ │ ├ Conventional Light
  │ │ ├ Field Condensate
  │ │ ├ In Situ Bitumen
  │ │ └ Mined Bitumen
  │ ├ Hydrogen
  │ │ ├ Total (calculated)
  │ │ ├ Biomass
  │ │ ├ Electrolysis
  │ │ └ Natural gas with CCS
  │ └ Natural Gas
  │   ├ Total
  │   ├ Solution
  │   ├ Non Associated
  │   ├ Tight
  │   ├ Shale
  │   └ Coalbed Methane
  ├ Financials
  │ ├ Benchmark Prices
  │ │ ├ Crude Oil
  │ │ └ Natural Gas
  │ ├ End Use Prices
  │ │ ├ ...
  │ │ ├ ...
  │ │ ├ ...
  │ │ └ ...
  │ └ Macro Indicators
  │   └ ...
  └ ...
```

# Production

```{r}
#| include: false
Production <- list()
#example: Production$Crude_Oil$Total
```

## _ {.tabset}

### Crude Oil {.tabset}

#### Total {.tabset-leaf}

```{r}
#| include: false
Production$Crude_Oil$Total <- EF2023$crude_oil_production %>%
  filter(Unit == "Thousand Cubic Metres per day",
         Variable == "Total") %>%
  mutate(Region = Region %>% factor %>% fct_recode(
    "AB" = "Alberta", "BC" = "British Columbia", "MB" = "Manitoba",
    "NB" = "New Brunswick", "NL" = "Newfoundland and Labrador",
    "NS" = "Nova Scotia", "NT" = "Northwest Territories",
    "NU" = "Nunavut", "ON" = "Ontario", "PE" = "Prince Edward Island",
    "QC" = "Quebec", "SK" = "Saskatchewan", "YT" = "Yukon",
    "Canada" = "Canada") %>% fct_relevel("Canada", after = 0),
    Scenario = Scenario %>% fct_relevel("Current Measures", after = 0))
```

::: {.production-tab-column-grid}

:::: {.card-row-grid}

```{r}
### Card: Current Measures total (1/3)
v1 <- Production$Crude_Oil$Total %>%
  filter(Year > 2022,
         Region == "Canada",
         Scenario == "Current Measures") %>%
  pull(Value) %>%
  {sum(. * 1000) * 365.24}

value_box_value <- v1 %>%
  # rp_format_proper2(format = list(do_B = T)) %>% 
  rp_format_proper() %>% 
  paste0(" m³")

value_box(theme = value_box_theme(bg = "#777", fg = "#EEE"),
        title = "Total (2023–2050)",
        value = value_box_value,
        tag("p", "Current measures (baseline)"))
###
```

```{r}
### Card: Canada Net-zero total (2/3)
v2 <- Production$Crude_Oil$Total %>%
  filter(Year > 2022,
         Region == "Canada",
         Scenario == "Canada Net-zero") %>%
  pull(Value) %>%
  {sum(. * 1000) * 365.24}

value_box_value <- v2 %>%
  # rp_format_proper2(format = list(do_B = T)) %>% 
  rp_format_proper() %>% 
  paste0(" m³")

value_box(theme = value_box_theme(bg = "#7e3434", fg = "#EEE"),
        title = "Total (2023–2050)",
        value = value_box_value,
        tag("p", paste0("Canada Net-zero", " (",
                        switch(as.character(sign(v2-v1)),
                               "1" = "▲", "0" = "►", "-1" = "▼"),
                        round((v2/v1 - 1) * 100), "%)")))
###
```

```{r}
### Card: Global Net-zero total (3/3)
v3 <- Production$Crude_Oil$Total %>%
  filter(Year > 2022,
         Region == "Canada",
         Scenario == "Global Net-zero") %>%
  pull(Value) %>%
  {sum(. * 1000) * 365.24}

value_box_value <- v3 %>%
  # rp_format_proper2(format = list(do_B = T)) %>% 
  rp_format_proper() %>% 
  paste0(" m³")

value_box(theme = value_box_theme(bg = "#256175", fg = "#EEE"),
        title = "Total (2023–2050)",
        value = value_box_value,
        tag("p", paste0("Global Net-zero", " (",
                        switch(as.character(sign(v3-v1)),
                               "1" = "▲", "0" = "►", "-1" = "▼"),
                        round((v3/v1 - 1) * 100), "%)")))
###
```

```{r}
### Card: Top contributor (Region)
# Get top contributor (Region)
value_box_data <- Production$Crude_Oil$Total %>%
  filter(Region != "Canada") %>%
  # Compute averages and contributions
  summarize(Value_Total = mean(Value),
            Value_Average = mean(Value),
            .by = Region) %>%
  mutate(Value_Percentage = Value_Total / sum(Value_Total)) %>% 
  # Get highest contribution
  arrange(desc(Value_Percentage)) %>%
  head(1) %>% 
  # Prepare labels
  mutate(Line_1 = paste0("Averaging ", round(Value_Average, 1), "k m³/day"),
         Line_2 = paste0("Contributing ", round(100 * Value_Percentage, 0), "% (avg.)"))
value_box_value <- value_box_data$Region
value_box_tag_1 <- value_box_data$Line_1
value_box_tag_2 <- value_box_data$Line_2

# Prepare showcase plot
value_box_plot <- Production$Crude_Oil$Total %>% 
  filter(Region == value_box_data$Region) %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = Year, y = Value, group = Scenario,
             col = Scenario, fill = Scenario,
             ymin = pmin(0, Value), ymax = pmax(0, Value))) +
  geom_ribbon(col = NULL, fill = "#AAA", alpha = 0.1) +
  geom_line(aes(text = paste0(round(Value), ": ", Scenario, " (", Year, ")")),
            alpha = 0.25, lwd = 0.25) +
  scale_color_discrete(palette = c("#777", "#7e3434", "#256175")) +
  theme_void() +
  theme(legend.position = "none")
value_box_plot <- ggplotly(value_box_plot, tooltip = "text") %>%
  layout(plot_bgcolor = "rgba(1,1,1,0)", hovermode = "x",
         hoverlabel = list(font = list(family = "Onest", size = 13)),
         xaxis = list(fixedrange = TRUE), yaxis = list(fixedrange = TRUE)) %>%
  config(displayModeBar = F)

# Draw value box
value_box(theme = value_box_theme(bg = "#EEE", fg = "#777"),
        title = "Top contributor",
        showcase = value_box_plot,
        showcase_layout = "bottom",
        value = value_box_value,
        # tag("p", value_box_tag_1),
        tag("p", value_box_tag_2))
###

```

::::

:::: {.plotly-grid}

```{r}
# Main plot
Production$Crude_Oil$Total %>%
  ridge_facet_plot(rp_X = Year, rp_Y = Value, rp_F1 = Scenario, rp_F2 = Region,
                   rp_title_main = "Canadian Crude Oil Production",
                   rp_title_Y = "Production", rp_unit_abbrev = "k m³/day",
                   rp_labs_Y = list(digits = 0, do_k = F, do_e = F),
                   rp_draw = list(points = F, peaks = T, medians = F,
                                  peaks_at = list(Y_min = F, Y_max = F,
                                                  X_values = c(2005, 2022, 2030, 2035, 2050))),
                   rp_alpha = list(ribbons = 0.35))
```

::::

:::

#### In Situ Bitumen {.tabset-leaf}

```{r}
#| include: false
Production$Crude_Oil$In_Situ_Bitumen <- EF2023$crude_oil_production %>%
  filter(Unit == "Thousand Cubic Metres per day",
         Variable == "In Situ Bitumen") %>%
  mutate(Region = Region %>% factor %>% fct_recode(
    "AB" = "Alberta", "BC" = "British Columbia", "MB" = "Manitoba",
    "NB" = "New Brunswick", "NL" = "Newfoundland and Labrador",
    "NS" = "Nova Scotia", "NT" = "Northwest Territories",
    "NU" = "Nunavut", "ON" = "Ontario", "PE" = "Prince Edward Island",
    "QC" = "Quebec", "SK" = "Saskatchewan", "YT" = "Yukon",
    "Canada" = "Canada") %>% fct_relevel("Canada", after = 0),
    Scenario = Scenario %>% fct_relevel("Current Measures", after = 0))
```

::: {.production-tab-column-grid}

:::: {.card-row-grid}

```{r}
### Card: Current Measures total (1/3)
v1 <- Production$Crude_Oil$In_Situ_Bitumen %>%
  filter(Year > 2022,
         Region == "Canada",
         Scenario == "Current Measures") %>%
  pull(Value) %>%
  {sum(. * 1000) * 365.24}

value_box_value <- v1 %>%
  # rp_format_proper2(format = list(do_B = T)) %>% 
  rp_format_proper() %>% 
  paste0(" m³")

value_box(theme = value_box_theme(bg = "#777", fg = "#EEE"),
        title = "Total (2023–2050)",
        value = value_box_value,
        tag("p", "Current measures (baseline)"))
###
```

```{r}
### Card: Canada Net-zero total (2/3)
v2 <- Production$Crude_Oil$In_Situ_Bitumen %>%
  filter(Year > 2022,
         Region == "Canada",
         Scenario == "Canada Net-zero") %>%
  pull(Value) %>%
  {sum(. * 1000) * 365.24}

value_box_value <- v2 %>%
  # rp_format_proper2(format = list(do_B = T)) %>% 
  rp_format_proper() %>% 
  paste0(" m³")

value_box(theme = value_box_theme(bg = "#7e3434", fg = "#EEE"),
        title = "Total (2023–2050)",
        value = value_box_value,
        tag("p", paste0("Canada Net-zero", " (",
                        switch(as.character(sign(v2-v1)),
                               "1" = "▲", "0" = "►", "-1" = "▼"),
                        round((v2/v1 - 1) * 100), "%)")))
###
```

```{r}
### Card: Global Net-zero total (3/3)
v3 <- Production$Crude_Oil$In_Situ_Bitumen %>%
  filter(Year > 2022,
         Region == "Canada",
         Scenario == "Global Net-zero") %>%
  pull(Value) %>%
  {sum(. * 1000) * 365.24}

value_box_value <- v3 %>%
  # rp_format_proper2(format = list(do_B = T)) %>% 
  rp_format_proper() %>% 
  paste0(" m³")

value_box(theme = value_box_theme(bg = "#256175", fg = "#EEE"),
        title = "Total (2023–2050)",
        value = value_box_value,
        tag("p", paste0("Global Net-zero", " (",
                        switch(as.character(sign(v3-v1)),
                               "1" = "▲", "0" = "►", "-1" = "▼"),
                        round((v3/v1 - 1) * 100), "%)")))
###
```

```{r}
### Card: Top contributor (Region)
# Get top contributor (Region)
value_box_data <- Production$Crude_Oil$In_Situ_Bitumen %>%
  filter(Region != "Canada") %>%
  # Compute averages and contributions
  summarize(Value_Total = mean(Value),
            Value_Average = mean(Value),
            .by = Region) %>%
  mutate(Value_Percentage = Value_Total / sum(Value_Total)) %>% 
  # Get highest contribution
  arrange(desc(Value_Percentage)) %>%
  head(1) %>% 
  # Prepare labels
  mutate(Line_1 = paste0("Averaging ", round(Value_Average, 1), "k m³/day"),
         Line_2 = paste0("Contributing ", round(100 * Value_Percentage, 0), "% (avg.)"))
value_box_value <- value_box_data$Region
value_box_tag_1 <- value_box_data$Line_1
value_box_tag_2 <- value_box_data$Line_2

# Prepare showcase plot
value_box_plot <- Production$Crude_Oil$In_Situ_Bitumen %>% 
  filter(Region == value_box_data$Region) %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = Year, y = Value, group = Scenario,
             col = Scenario, fill = Scenario,
             ymin = pmin(0, Value), ymax = pmax(0, Value))) +
  geom_ribbon(col = NULL, fill = "#AAA", alpha = 0.1) +
  geom_line(aes(text = paste0(round(Value), ": ", Scenario, " (", Year, ")")),
            alpha = 0.25, lwd = 0.25) +
  scale_color_discrete(palette = c("#777", "#7e3434", "#256175")) +
  theme_void() +
  theme(legend.position = "none")
value_box_plot <- ggplotly(value_box_plot, tooltip = "text") %>%
  layout(plot_bgcolor = "rgba(1,1,1,0)", hovermode = "x",
         hoverlabel = list(font = list(family = "Onest", size = 13)),
         xaxis = list(fixedrange = TRUE), yaxis = list(fixedrange = TRUE)) %>%
  config(displayModeBar = F)

# Draw value box
value_box(theme = value_box_theme(bg = "#EEE", fg = "#777"),
        title = "Top contributor",
        showcase = value_box_plot,
        showcase_layout = "bottom",
        value = value_box_value,
        # tag("p", value_box_tag_1),
        tag("p", value_box_tag_2))
###

```

::::

:::: {.plotly-grid}

```{r}
# Main plot
Production$Crude_Oil$In_Situ_Bitumen %>%
  ridge_facet_plot(rp_X = Year, rp_Y = Value, rp_F1 = Scenario, rp_F2 = Region,
                   rp_title_main = "Canadian Crude Oil Production",
                   rp_title_Y = "Production", rp_unit_abbrev = "k m³/day",
                   rp_labs_Y = list(digits = 0, do_k = F, do_e = F),
                   rp_draw = list(points = F, peaks = T, medians = F,
                                  peaks_at = list(Y_min = F, Y_max = F,
                                                  X_values = c(2005, 2022, 2030, 2035, 2050))),
                   rp_alpha = list(ribbons = 0.35))
```

::::

:::

#### Mined Bitumen {.tabset-leaf}

```{r}
#| include: false
Production$Crude_Oil$Mined_Bitumen <- EF2023$crude_oil_production %>%
  filter(Unit == "Thousand Cubic Metres per day",
         Variable == "Mined Bitumen") %>%
  mutate(Region = Region %>% factor %>% fct_recode(
    "AB" = "Alberta", "BC" = "British Columbia", "MB" = "Manitoba",
    "NB" = "New Brunswick", "NL" = "Newfoundland and Labrador",
    "NS" = "Nova Scotia", "NT" = "Northwest Territories",
    "NU" = "Nunavut", "ON" = "Ontario", "PE" = "Prince Edward Island",
    "QC" = "Quebec", "SK" = "Saskatchewan", "YT" = "Yukon",
    "Canada" = "Canada") %>% fct_relevel("Canada", after = 0),
    Scenario = Scenario %>% fct_relevel("Current Measures", after = 0))
```

::: {.production-tab-column-grid}

:::: {.card-row-grid}

```{r}
### Card: Current Measures total (1/3)
v1 <- Production$Crude_Oil$Mined_Bitumen %>%
  filter(Year > 2022,
         Region == "Canada",
         Scenario == "Current Measures") %>%
  pull(Value) %>%
  {sum(. * 1000) * 365.24}

value_box_value <- v1 %>%
  # rp_format_proper2(format = list(do_B = T)) %>% 
  rp_format_proper() %>% 
  paste0(" m³")

value_box(theme = value_box_theme(bg = "#777", fg = "#EEE"),
        title = "Total (2023–2050)",
        value = value_box_value,
        tag("p", "Current measures (baseline)"))
###
```

```{r}
### Card: Canada Net-zero total (2/3)
v2 <- Production$Crude_Oil$Mined_Bitumen %>%
  filter(Year > 2022,
         Region == "Canada",
         Scenario == "Canada Net-zero") %>%
  pull(Value) %>%
  {sum(. * 1000) * 365.24}

value_box_value <- v2 %>%
  # rp_format_proper2(format = list(do_B = T)) %>% 
  rp_format_proper() %>% 
  paste0(" m³")

value_box(theme = value_box_theme(bg = "#7e3434", fg = "#EEE"),
        title = "Total (2023–2050)",
        value = value_box_value,
        tag("p", paste0("Canada Net-zero", " (",
                        switch(as.character(sign(v2-v1)),
                               "1" = "▲", "0" = "►", "-1" = "▼"),
                        round((v2/v1 - 1) * 100), "%)")))
###
```

```{r}
### Card: Global Net-zero total (3/3)
v3 <- Production$Crude_Oil$Mined_Bitumen %>%
  filter(Year > 2022,
         Region == "Canada",
         Scenario == "Global Net-zero") %>%
  pull(Value) %>%
  {sum(. * 1000) * 365.24}

value_box_value <- v3 %>%
  # rp_format_proper2(format = list(do_B = T)) %>% 
  rp_format_proper() %>% 
  paste0(" m³")

value_box(theme = value_box_theme(bg = "#256175", fg = "#EEE"),
        title = "Total (2023–2050)",
        value = value_box_value,
        tag("p", paste0("Global Net-zero", " (",
                        switch(as.character(sign(v3-v1)),
                               "1" = "▲", "0" = "►", "-1" = "▼"),
                        round((v3/v1 - 1) * 100), "%)")))
###
```

```{r}
### Card: Top contributor (Region)
# Get top contributor (Region)
value_box_data <- Production$Crude_Oil$Mined_Bitumen %>%
  filter(Region != "Canada") %>%
  # Compute averages and contributions
  summarize(Value_Total = mean(Value),
            Value_Average = mean(Value),
            .by = Region) %>%
  mutate(Value_Percentage = Value_Total / sum(Value_Total)) %>% 
  # Get highest contribution
  arrange(desc(Value_Percentage)) %>%
  head(1) %>% 
  # Prepare labels
  mutate(Line_1 = paste0("Averaging ", round(Value_Average, 1), "k m³/day"),
         Line_2 = paste0("Contributing ", round(100 * Value_Percentage, 0), "% (avg.)"))
value_box_value <- value_box_data$Region
value_box_tag_1 <- value_box_data$Line_1
value_box_tag_2 <- value_box_data$Line_2

# Prepare showcase plot
value_box_plot <- Production$Crude_Oil$Mined_Bitumen %>% 
  filter(Region == value_box_data$Region) %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = Year, y = Value, group = Scenario,
             col = Scenario, fill = Scenario,
             ymin = pmin(0, Value), ymax = pmax(0, Value))) +
  geom_ribbon(col = NULL, fill = "#AAA", alpha = 0.1) +
  geom_line(aes(text = paste0(round(Value), ": ", Scenario, " (", Year, ")")),
            alpha = 0.25, lwd = 0.25) +
  scale_color_discrete(palette = c("#777", "#7e3434", "#256175")) +
  theme_void() +
  theme(legend.position = "none")
value_box_plot <- ggplotly(value_box_plot, tooltip = "text") %>%
  layout(plot_bgcolor = "rgba(1,1,1,0)", hovermode = "x",
         hoverlabel = list(font = list(family = "Onest", size = 13)),
         xaxis = list(fixedrange = TRUE), yaxis = list(fixedrange = TRUE)) %>%
  config(displayModeBar = F)

# Draw value box
value_box(theme = value_box_theme(bg = "#EEE", fg = "#777"),
        title = "Top contributor",
        showcase = value_box_plot,
        showcase_layout = "bottom",
        value = value_box_value,
        # tag("p", value_box_tag_1),
        tag("p", value_box_tag_2))
###

```

::::

:::: {.plotly-grid}

```{r}
# Main plot
Production$Crude_Oil$Mined_Bitumen %>%
  ridge_facet_plot(rp_X = Year, rp_Y = Value, rp_F1 = Scenario, rp_F2 = Region,
                   rp_title_main = "Canadian Crude Oil Production",
                   rp_title_Y = "Production", rp_unit_abbrev = "k m³/day",
                   rp_labs_Y = list(digits = 0, do_k = F, do_e = F),
                   rp_draw = list(points = F, peaks = T, medians = F,
                                  peaks_at = list(Y_min = F, Y_max = F,
                                                  X_values = c(2005, 2022, 2030, 2035, 2050))),
                   rp_alpha = list(ribbons = 0.35))
```

::::

:::

#### Upgraded Bitumen {.tabset-leaf}

```{r}
#| include: false
Production$Crude_Oil$Upgraded_Bitumen <- EF2023$crude_oil_production %>%
  filter(Unit == "Thousand Cubic Metres per day",
         Variable == "(Upgraded Bitumen)") %>%
  mutate(Region = Region %>% factor %>% fct_recode(
    "AB" = "Alberta", "BC" = "British Columbia", "MB" = "Manitoba",
    "NB" = "New Brunswick", "NL" = "Newfoundland and Labrador",
    "NS" = "Nova Scotia", "NT" = "Northwest Territories",
    "NU" = "Nunavut", "ON" = "Ontario", "PE" = "Prince Edward Island",
    "QC" = "Quebec", "SK" = "Saskatchewan", "YT" = "Yukon",
    "Canada" = "Canada") %>% fct_relevel("Canada", after = 0),
    Scenario = Scenario %>% fct_relevel("Current Measures", after = 0))
```

::: {.production-tab-column-grid}

:::: {.card-row-grid}

```{r}
### Card: Current Measures total (1/3)
v1 <- Production$Crude_Oil$Upgraded_Bitumen %>%
  filter(Year > 2022,
         Region == "Canada",
         Scenario == "Current Measures") %>%
  pull(Value) %>%
  {sum(. * 1000) * 365.24}

value_box_value <- v1 %>%
  # rp_format_proper2(format = list(do_B = T)) %>% 
  rp_format_proper() %>% 
  paste0(" m³")

value_box(theme = value_box_theme(bg = "#777", fg = "#EEE"),
        title = "Total (2023–2050)",
        value = value_box_value,
        tag("p", "Current measures (baseline)"))
###
```

```{r}
### Card: Canada Net-zero total (2/3)
v2 <- Production$Crude_Oil$Upgraded_Bitumen %>%
  filter(Year > 2022,
         Region == "Canada",
         Scenario == "Canada Net-zero") %>%
  pull(Value) %>%
  {sum(. * 1000) * 365.24}

value_box_value <- v2 %>%
  # rp_format_proper2(format = list(do_B = T)) %>% 
  rp_format_proper() %>% 
  paste0(" m³")

value_box(theme = value_box_theme(bg = "#7e3434", fg = "#EEE"),
        title = "Total (2023–2050)",
        value = value_box_value,
        tag("p", paste0("Canada Net-zero", " (",
                        switch(as.character(sign(v2-v1)),
                               "1" = "▲", "0" = "►", "-1" = "▼"),
                        round((v2/v1 - 1) * 100), "%)")))
###
```

```{r}
### Card: Global Net-zero total (3/3)
v3 <- Production$Crude_Oil$Upgraded_Bitumen %>%
  filter(Year > 2022,
         Region == "Canada",
         Scenario == "Global Net-zero") %>%
  pull(Value) %>%
  {sum(. * 1000) * 365.24}

value_box_value <- v3 %>%
  # rp_format_proper2(format = list(do_B = T)) %>% 
  rp_format_proper() %>% 
  paste0(" m³")

value_box(theme = value_box_theme(bg = "#256175", fg = "#EEE"),
        title = "Total (2023–2050)",
        value = value_box_value,
        tag("p", paste0("Global Net-zero", " (",
                        switch(as.character(sign(v3-v1)),
                               "1" = "▲", "0" = "►", "-1" = "▼"),
                        round((v3/v1 - 1) * 100), "%)")))
###
```

```{r}
### Card: Top contributor (Region)
# Get top contributor (Region)
value_box_data <- Production$Crude_Oil$Upgraded_Bitumen %>%
  filter(Region != "Canada") %>%
  # Compute averages and contributions
  summarize(Value_Total = mean(Value),
            Value_Average = mean(Value),
            .by = Region) %>%
  mutate(Value_Percentage = Value_Total / sum(Value_Total)) %>% 
  # Get highest contribution
  arrange(desc(Value_Percentage)) %>%
  head(1) %>% 
  # Prepare labels
  mutate(Line_1 = paste0("Averaging ", round(Value_Average, 1), "k m³/day"),
         Line_2 = paste0("Contributing ", round(100 * Value_Percentage, 0), "% (avg.)"))
value_box_value <- value_box_data$Region
value_box_tag_1 <- value_box_data$Line_1
value_box_tag_2 <- value_box_data$Line_2

# Prepare showcase plot
value_box_plot <- Production$Crude_Oil$Upgraded_Bitumen %>% 
  filter(Region == value_box_data$Region) %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = Year, y = Value, group = Scenario,
             col = Scenario, fill = Scenario,
             ymin = pmin(0, Value), ymax = pmax(0, Value))) +
  geom_ribbon(col = NULL, fill = "#AAA", alpha = 0.1) +
  geom_line(aes(text = paste0(round(Value), ": ", Scenario, " (", Year, ")")),
            alpha = 0.25, lwd = 0.25) +
  scale_color_discrete(palette = c("#777", "#7e3434", "#256175")) +
  theme_void() +
  theme(legend.position = "none")
value_box_plot <- ggplotly(value_box_plot, tooltip = "text") %>%
  layout(plot_bgcolor = "rgba(1,1,1,0)", hovermode = "x",
         hoverlabel = list(font = list(family = "Onest", size = 13)),
         xaxis = list(fixedrange = TRUE), yaxis = list(fixedrange = TRUE)) %>%
  config(displayModeBar = F)

# Draw value box
value_box(theme = value_box_theme(bg = "#EEE", fg = "#777"),
        title = "Top contributor",
        showcase = value_box_plot,
        showcase_layout = "bottom",
        value = value_box_value,
        # tag("p", value_box_tag_1),
        tag("p", value_box_tag_2))
###

```

::::

:::: {.plotly-grid}

```{r}
# Main plot
Production$Crude_Oil$Upgraded_Bitumen %>%
  ridge_facet_plot(rp_X = Year, rp_Y = Value, rp_F1 = Scenario, rp_F2 = Region,
                   rp_title_main = "Canadian Crude Oil Production",
                   rp_title_Y = "Production", rp_unit_abbrev = "k m³/day",
                   rp_labs_Y = list(digits = 0, do_k = F, do_e = F),
                   rp_draw = list(points = F, peaks = T, medians = F,
                                  peaks_at = list(Y_min = F, Y_max = F,
                                                  X_values = c(2005, 2022, 2030, 2035, 2050))),
                   rp_alpha = list(ribbons = 0.35))
```

::::

:::

#### Conventional Light {.tabset-leaf}

```{r}
#| include: false
Production$Crude_Oil$Conventional_Light <- EF2023$crude_oil_production %>%
  filter(Unit == "Thousand Cubic Metres per day",
         Variable == "Conventional Light") %>%
  mutate(Region = Region %>% factor %>% fct_recode(
    "AB" = "Alberta", "BC" = "British Columbia", "MB" = "Manitoba",
    "NB" = "New Brunswick", "NL" = "Newfoundland and Labrador",
    "NS" = "Nova Scotia", "NT" = "Northwest Territories",
    "NU" = "Nunavut", "ON" = "Ontario", "PE" = "Prince Edward Island",
    "QC" = "Quebec", "SK" = "Saskatchewan", "YT" = "Yukon",
    "Canada" = "Canada") %>% fct_relevel("Canada", after = 0),
    Scenario = Scenario %>% fct_relevel("Current Measures", after = 0))
```

::: {.production-tab-column-grid}

:::: {.card-row-grid}

```{r}
### Card: Current Measures total (1/3)
v1 <- Production$Crude_Oil$Conventional_Light %>%
  filter(Year > 2022,
         Region == "Canada",
         Scenario == "Current Measures") %>%
  pull(Value) %>%
  {sum(. * 1000) * 365.24}

value_box_value <- v1 %>%
  # rp_format_proper2(format = list(do_B = T)) %>% 
  rp_format_proper() %>% 
  paste0(" m³")

value_box(theme = value_box_theme(bg = "#777", fg = "#EEE"),
        title = "Total (2023–2050)",
        value = value_box_value,
        tag("p", "Current measures (baseline)"))
###
```

```{r}
### Card: Canada Net-zero total (2/3)
v2 <- Production$Crude_Oil$Conventional_Light %>%
  filter(Year > 2022,
         Region == "Canada",
         Scenario == "Canada Net-zero") %>%
  pull(Value) %>%
  {sum(. * 1000) * 365.24}

value_box_value <- v2 %>%
  # rp_format_proper2(format = list(do_B = T)) %>% 
  rp_format_proper() %>% 
  paste0(" m³")

value_box(theme = value_box_theme(bg = "#7e3434", fg = "#EEE"),
        title = "Total (2023–2050)",
        value = value_box_value,
        tag("p", paste0("Canada Net-zero", " (",
                        switch(as.character(sign(v2-v1)),
                               "1" = "▲", "0" = "►", "-1" = "▼"),
                        round((v2/v1 - 1) * 100), "%)")))
###
```

```{r}
### Card: Global Net-zero total (3/3)
v3 <- Production$Crude_Oil$Conventional_Light %>%
  filter(Year > 2022,
         Region == "Canada",
         Scenario == "Global Net-zero") %>%
  pull(Value) %>%
  {sum(. * 1000) * 365.24}

value_box_value <- v3 %>%
  # rp_format_proper2(format = list(do_B = T)) %>% 
  rp_format_proper() %>% 
  paste0(" m³")

value_box(theme = value_box_theme(bg = "#256175", fg = "#EEE"),
        title = "Total (2023–2050)",
        value = value_box_value,
        tag("p", paste0("Global Net-zero", " (",
                        switch(as.character(sign(v3-v1)),
                               "1" = "▲", "0" = "►", "-1" = "▼"),
                        round((v3/v1 - 1) * 100), "%)")))
###
```

```{r}
### Card: Top contributor (Region)
# Get top contributor (Region)
value_box_data <- Production$Crude_Oil$Conventional_Light %>%
  filter(Region != "Canada") %>%
  # Compute averages and contributions
  summarize(Value_Total = mean(Value),
            Value_Average = mean(Value),
            .by = Region) %>%
  mutate(Value_Percentage = Value_Total / sum(Value_Total)) %>% 
  # Get highest contribution
  arrange(desc(Value_Percentage)) %>%
  head(1) %>% 
  # Prepare labels
  mutate(Line_1 = paste0("Averaging ", round(Value_Average, 1), "k m³/day"),
         Line_2 = paste0("Contributing ", round(100 * Value_Percentage, 0), "% (avg.)"))
value_box_value <- value_box_data$Region
value_box_tag_1 <- value_box_data$Line_1
value_box_tag_2 <- value_box_data$Line_2

# Prepare showcase plot
value_box_plot <- Production$Crude_Oil$Conventional_Light %>% 
  filter(Region == value_box_data$Region) %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = Year, y = Value, group = Scenario,
             col = Scenario, fill = Scenario,
             ymin = pmin(0, Value), ymax = pmax(0, Value))) +
  geom_ribbon(col = NULL, fill = "#AAA", alpha = 0.1) +
  geom_line(aes(text = paste0(round(Value), ": ", Scenario, " (", Year, ")")),
            alpha = 0.25, lwd = 0.25) +
  scale_color_discrete(palette = c("#777", "#7e3434", "#256175")) +
  theme_void() +
  theme(legend.position = "none")
value_box_plot <- ggplotly(value_box_plot, tooltip = "text") %>%
  layout(plot_bgcolor = "rgba(1,1,1,0)", hovermode = "x",
         hoverlabel = list(font = list(family = "Onest", size = 13)),
         xaxis = list(fixedrange = TRUE), yaxis = list(fixedrange = TRUE)) %>%
  config(displayModeBar = F)

# Draw value box
value_box(theme = value_box_theme(bg = "#EEE", fg = "#777"),
        title = "Top contributor",
        showcase = value_box_plot,
        showcase_layout = "bottom",
        value = value_box_value,
        # tag("p", value_box_tag_1),
        tag("p", value_box_tag_2))
###

```

::::

:::: {.plotly-grid}

```{r}
# Main plot
Production$Crude_Oil$Conventional_Light %>%
  ridge_facet_plot(rp_X = Year, rp_Y = Value, rp_F1 = Scenario, rp_F2 = Region,
                   rp_title_main = "Canadian Crude Oil Production",
                   rp_title_Y = "Production", rp_unit_abbrev = "k m³/day",
                   rp_labs_Y = list(digits = 0, do_k = F, do_e = F),
                   rp_draw = list(points = F, peaks = T, medians = F,
                                  peaks_at = list(Y_min = F, Y_max = F,
                                                  X_values = c(2005, 2022, 2030, 2035, 2050))),
                   rp_alpha = list(ribbons = 0.35))
```

::::

:::

#### Field Condensate {.tabset-leaf}

```{r}
#| include: false
Production$Crude_Oil$Field_Condensate <- EF2023$crude_oil_production %>%
  filter(Unit == "Thousand Cubic Metres per day",
         Variable == "Field Condensate") %>%
  mutate(Region = Region %>% factor %>% fct_recode(
    "AB" = "Alberta", "BC" = "British Columbia", "MB" = "Manitoba",
    "NB" = "New Brunswick", "NL" = "Newfoundland and Labrador",
    "NS" = "Nova Scotia", "NT" = "Northwest Territories",
    "NU" = "Nunavut", "ON" = "Ontario", "PE" = "Prince Edward Island",
    "QC" = "Quebec", "SK" = "Saskatchewan", "YT" = "Yukon",
    "Canada" = "Canada") %>% fct_relevel("Canada", after = 0),
    Scenario = Scenario %>% fct_relevel("Current Measures", after = 0))
```

::: {.production-tab-column-grid}

:::: {.card-row-grid}

```{r}
### Card: Current Measures total (1/3)
v1 <- Production$Crude_Oil$Field_Condensate %>%
  filter(Year > 2022,
         Region == "Canada",
         Scenario == "Current Measures") %>%
  pull(Value) %>%
  {sum(. * 1000) * 365.24}

value_box_value <- v1 %>%
  # rp_format_proper2(format = list(do_B = T)) %>% 
  rp_format_proper() %>% 
  paste0(" m³")

value_box(theme = value_box_theme(bg = "#777", fg = "#EEE"),
        title = "Total (2023–2050)",
        value = value_box_value,
        tag("p", "Current measures (baseline)"))
###
```

```{r}
### Card: Canada Net-zero total (2/3)
v2 <- Production$Crude_Oil$Field_Condensate %>%
  filter(Year > 2022,
         Region == "Canada",
         Scenario == "Canada Net-zero") %>%
  pull(Value) %>%
  {sum(. * 1000) * 365.24}

value_box_value <- v2 %>%
  # rp_format_proper2(format = list(do_B = T)) %>% 
  rp_format_proper() %>% 
  paste0(" m³")

value_box(theme = value_box_theme(bg = "#7e3434", fg = "#EEE"),
        title = "Total (2023–2050)",
        value = value_box_value,
        tag("p", paste0("Canada Net-zero", " (",
                        switch(as.character(sign(v2-v1)),
                               "1" = "▲", "0" = "►", "-1" = "▼"),
                        round((v2/v1 - 1) * 100), "%)")))
###
```

```{r}
### Card: Global Net-zero total (3/3)
v3 <- Production$Crude_Oil$Field_Condensate %>%
  filter(Year > 2022,
         Region == "Canada",
         Scenario == "Global Net-zero") %>%
  pull(Value) %>%
  {sum(. * 1000) * 365.24}

value_box_value <- v3 %>%
  # rp_format_proper2(format = list(do_B = T)) %>% 
  rp_format_proper() %>% 
  paste0(" m³")

value_box(theme = value_box_theme(bg = "#256175", fg = "#EEE"),
        title = "Total (2023–2050)",
        value = value_box_value,
        tag("p", paste0("Global Net-zero", " (",
                        switch(as.character(sign(v3-v1)),
                               "1" = "▲", "0" = "►", "-1" = "▼"),
                        round((v3/v1 - 1) * 100), "%)")))
###
```

```{r}
### Card: Top contributor (Region)
# Get top contributor (Region)
value_box_data <- Production$Crude_Oil$Field_Condensate %>%
  filter(Region != "Canada") %>%
  # Compute averages and contributions
  summarize(Value_Total = mean(Value),
            Value_Average = mean(Value),
            .by = Region) %>%
  mutate(Value_Percentage = Value_Total / sum(Value_Total)) %>% 
  # Get highest contribution
  arrange(desc(Value_Percentage)) %>%
  head(1) %>% 
  # Prepare labels
  mutate(Line_1 = paste0("Averaging ", round(Value_Average, 1), "k m³/day"),
         Line_2 = paste0("Contributing ", round(100 * Value_Percentage, 0), "% (avg.)"))
value_box_value <- value_box_data$Region
value_box_tag_1 <- value_box_data$Line_1
value_box_tag_2 <- value_box_data$Line_2

# Prepare showcase plot
value_box_plot <- Production$Crude_Oil$Field_Condensate %>% 
  filter(Region == value_box_data$Region) %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = Year, y = Value, group = Scenario,
             col = Scenario, fill = Scenario,
             ymin = pmin(0, Value), ymax = pmax(0, Value))) +
  geom_ribbon(col = NULL, fill = "#AAA", alpha = 0.1) +
  geom_line(aes(text = paste0(round(Value), ": ", Scenario, " (", Year, ")")),
            alpha = 0.25, lwd = 0.25) +
  scale_color_discrete(palette = c("#777", "#7e3434", "#256175")) +
  theme_void() +
  theme(legend.position = "none")
value_box_plot <- ggplotly(value_box_plot, tooltip = "text") %>%
  layout(plot_bgcolor = "rgba(1,1,1,0)", hovermode = "x",
         hoverlabel = list(font = list(family = "Onest", size = 13)),
         xaxis = list(fixedrange = TRUE), yaxis = list(fixedrange = TRUE)) %>%
  config(displayModeBar = F)

# Draw value box
value_box(theme = value_box_theme(bg = "#EEE", fg = "#777"),
        title = "Top contributor",
        showcase = value_box_plot,
        showcase_layout = "bottom",
        value = value_box_value,
        # tag("p", value_box_tag_1),
        tag("p", value_box_tag_2))
###

```

::::

:::: {.plotly-grid}

```{r}
# Main plot
Production$Crude_Oil$Field_Condensate %>%
  ridge_facet_plot(rp_X = Year, rp_Y = Value, rp_F1 = Scenario, rp_F2 = Region,
                   rp_title_main = "Canadian Crude Oil Production",
                   rp_title_Y = "Production", rp_unit_abbrev = "k m³/day",
                   rp_labs_Y = list(digits = 0, do_k = F, do_e = F),
                   rp_draw = list(points = F, peaks = T, medians = F,
                                  peaks_at = list(Y_min = F, Y_max = F,
                                                  X_values = c(2005, 2022, 2030, 2035, 2050))),
                   rp_alpha = list(ribbons = 0.35))
```

::::

:::

#### Conventional Heavy {.tabset-leaf}

```{r}
#| include: false
Production$Crude_Oil$Conventional_Heavy <- EF2023$crude_oil_production %>%
  filter(Unit == "Thousand Cubic Metres per day",
         Variable == "Conventional Heavy") %>%
  mutate(Region = Region %>% factor %>% fct_recode(
    "AB" = "Alberta", "BC" = "British Columbia", "MB" = "Manitoba",
    "NB" = "New Brunswick", "NL" = "Newfoundland and Labrador",
    "NS" = "Nova Scotia", "NT" = "Northwest Territories",
    "NU" = "Nunavut", "ON" = "Ontario", "PE" = "Prince Edward Island",
    "QC" = "Quebec", "SK" = "Saskatchewan", "YT" = "Yukon",
    "Canada" = "Canada") %>% fct_relevel("Canada", after = 0),
    Scenario = Scenario %>% fct_relevel("Current Measures", after = 0))
```

::: {.production-tab-column-grid}

:::: {.card-row-grid}

```{r}
### Card: Current Measures total (1/3)
v1 <- Production$Crude_Oil$Conventional_Heavy %>%
  filter(Year > 2022,
         Region == "Canada",
         Scenario == "Current Measures") %>%
  pull(Value) %>%
  {sum(. * 1000) * 365.24}

value_box_value <- v1 %>%
  # rp_format_proper2(format = list(do_B = T)) %>% 
  rp_format_proper() %>% 
  paste0(" m³")

value_box(theme = value_box_theme(bg = "#777", fg = "#EEE"),
        title = "Total (2023–2050)",
        value = value_box_value,
        tag("p", "Current measures (baseline)"))
###
```

```{r}
### Card: Canada Net-zero total (2/3)
v2 <- Production$Crude_Oil$Conventional_Heavy %>%
  filter(Year > 2022,
         Region == "Canada",
         Scenario == "Canada Net-zero") %>%
  pull(Value) %>%
  {sum(. * 1000) * 365.24}

value_box_value <- v2 %>%
  # rp_format_proper2(format = list(do_B = T)) %>% 
  rp_format_proper() %>% 
  paste0(" m³")

value_box(theme = value_box_theme(bg = "#7e3434", fg = "#EEE"),
        title = "Total (2023–2050)",
        value = value_box_value,
        tag("p", paste0("Canada Net-zero", " (",
                        switch(as.character(sign(v2-v1)),
                               "1" = "▲", "0" = "►", "-1" = "▼"),
                        round((v2/v1 - 1) * 100), "%)")))
###
```

```{r}
### Card: Global Net-zero total (3/3)
v3 <- Production$Crude_Oil$Conventional_Heavy %>%
  filter(Year > 2022,
         Region == "Canada",
         Scenario == "Global Net-zero") %>%
  pull(Value) %>%
  {sum(. * 1000) * 365.24}

value_box_value <- v3 %>%
  # rp_format_proper2(format = list(do_B = T)) %>% 
  rp_format_proper() %>% 
  paste0(" m³")

value_box(theme = value_box_theme(bg = "#256175", fg = "#EEE"),
        title = "Total (2023–2050)",
        value = value_box_value,
        tag("p", paste0("Global Net-zero", " (",
                        switch(as.character(sign(v3-v1)),
                               "1" = "▲", "0" = "►", "-1" = "▼"),
                        round((v3/v1 - 1) * 100), "%)")))
###
```

```{r}
### Card: Top contributor (Region)
# Get top contributor (Region)
value_box_data <- Production$Crude_Oil$Conventional_Heavy %>%
  filter(Region != "Canada") %>%
  # Compute averages and contributions
  summarize(Value_Total = mean(Value),
            Value_Average = mean(Value),
            .by = Region) %>%
  mutate(Value_Percentage = Value_Total / sum(Value_Total)) %>% 
  # Get highest contribution
  arrange(desc(Value_Percentage)) %>%
  head(1) %>% 
  # Prepare labels
  mutate(Line_1 = paste0("Averaging ", round(Value_Average, 1), "k m³/day"),
         Line_2 = paste0("Contributing ", round(100 * Value_Percentage, 0), "% (avg.)"))
value_box_value <- value_box_data$Region
value_box_tag_1 <- value_box_data$Line_1
value_box_tag_2 <- value_box_data$Line_2

# Prepare showcase plot
value_box_plot <- Production$Crude_Oil$Conventional_Heavy %>% 
  filter(Region == value_box_data$Region) %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = Year, y = Value, group = Scenario,
             col = Scenario, fill = Scenario,
             ymin = pmin(0, Value), ymax = pmax(0, Value))) +
  geom_ribbon(col = NULL, fill = "#AAA", alpha = 0.1) +
  geom_line(aes(text = paste0(round(Value), ": ", Scenario, " (", Year, ")")),
            alpha = 0.25, lwd = 0.25) +
  scale_color_discrete(palette = c("#777", "#7e3434", "#256175")) +
  theme_void() +
  theme(legend.position = "none")
value_box_plot <- ggplotly(value_box_plot, tooltip = "text") %>%
  layout(plot_bgcolor = "rgba(1,1,1,0)", hovermode = "x",
         hoverlabel = list(font = list(family = "Onest", size = 13)),
         xaxis = list(fixedrange = TRUE), yaxis = list(fixedrange = TRUE)) %>%
  config(displayModeBar = F)

# Draw value box
value_box(theme = value_box_theme(bg = "#EEE", fg = "#777"),
        title = "Top contributor",
        showcase = value_box_plot,
        showcase_layout = "bottom",
        value = value_box_value,
        # tag("p", value_box_tag_1),
        tag("p", value_box_tag_2))
###

```

::::

:::: {.plotly-grid}

```{r}
# Main plot
Production$Crude_Oil$Conventional_Heavy %>%
  ridge_facet_plot(rp_X = Year, rp_Y = Value, rp_F1 = Scenario, rp_F2 = Region,
                   rp_title_main = "Canadian Crude Oil Production",
                   rp_title_Y = "Production", rp_unit_abbrev = "k m³/day",
                   rp_labs_Y = list(digits = 0, do_k = F, do_e = F),
                   rp_draw = list(points = F, peaks = T, medians = F,
                                  peaks_at = list(Y_min = F, Y_max = F,
                                                  X_values = c(2005, 2022, 2030, 2035, 2050))),
                   rp_alpha = list(ribbons = 0.35))
```

::::

:::

#### C5+ {.tabset-leaf}

```{r}
#| include: false
Production$Crude_Oil$C5_plus <- EF2023$crude_oil_production %>%
  filter(Unit == "Thousand Cubic Metres per day",
         Variable == "C5+") %>%
  mutate(Region = Region %>% factor %>% fct_recode(
    "AB" = "Alberta", "BC" = "British Columbia", "MB" = "Manitoba",
    "NB" = "New Brunswick", "NL" = "Newfoundland and Labrador",
    "NS" = "Nova Scotia", "NT" = "Northwest Territories",
    "NU" = "Nunavut", "ON" = "Ontario", "PE" = "Prince Edward Island",
    "QC" = "Quebec", "SK" = "Saskatchewan", "YT" = "Yukon",
    "Canada" = "Canada") %>% fct_relevel("Canada", after = 0),
    Scenario = Scenario %>% fct_relevel("Current Measures", after = 0))
```

::: {.production-tab-column-grid}

:::: {.card-row-grid}

```{r}
### Card: Current Measures total (1/3)
v1 <- Production$Crude_Oil$C5_plus %>%
  filter(Year > 2022,
         Region == "Canada",
         Scenario == "Current Measures") %>%
  pull(Value) %>%
  {sum(. * 1000) * 365.24}

value_box_value <- v1 %>%
  # rp_format_proper2(format = list(do_B = T)) %>% 
  rp_format_proper() %>% 
  paste0(" m³")

value_box(theme = value_box_theme(bg = "#777", fg = "#EEE"),
        title = "Total (2023–2050)",
        value = value_box_value,
        tag("p", "Current measures (baseline)"))
###
```

```{r}
### Card: Canada Net-zero total (2/3)
v2 <- Production$Crude_Oil$C5_plus %>%
  filter(Year > 2022,
         Region == "Canada",
         Scenario == "Canada Net-zero") %>%
  pull(Value) %>%
  {sum(. * 1000) * 365.24}

value_box_value <- v2 %>%
  # rp_format_proper2(format = list(do_B = T)) %>% 
  rp_format_proper() %>% 
  paste0(" m³")

value_box(theme = value_box_theme(bg = "#7e3434", fg = "#EEE"),
        title = "Total (2023–2050)",
        value = value_box_value,
        tag("p", paste0("Canada Net-zero", " (",
                        switch(as.character(sign(v2-v1)),
                               "1" = "▲", "0" = "►", "-1" = "▼"),
                        round((v2/v1 - 1) * 100), "%)")))
###
```

```{r}
### Card: Global Net-zero total (3/3)
v3 <- Production$Crude_Oil$C5_plus %>%
  filter(Year > 2022,
         Region == "Canada",
         Scenario == "Global Net-zero") %>%
  pull(Value) %>%
  {sum(. * 1000) * 365.24}

value_box_value <- v3 %>%
  # rp_format_proper2(format = list(do_B = T)) %>% 
  rp_format_proper() %>% 
  paste0(" m³")

value_box(theme = value_box_theme(bg = "#256175", fg = "#EEE"),
        title = "Total (2023–2050)",
        value = value_box_value,
        tag("p", paste0("Global Net-zero", " (",
                        switch(as.character(sign(v3-v1)),
                               "1" = "▲", "0" = "►", "-1" = "▼"),
                        round((v3/v1 - 1) * 100), "%)")))
###
```

```{r}
### Card: Top contributor (Region)
# Get top contributor (Region)
value_box_data <- Production$Crude_Oil$C5_plus %>%
  filter(Region != "Canada") %>%
  # Compute averages and contributions
  summarize(Value_Total = mean(Value),
            Value_Average = mean(Value),
            .by = Region) %>%
  mutate(Value_Percentage = Value_Total / sum(Value_Total)) %>% 
  # Get highest contribution
  arrange(desc(Value_Percentage)) %>%
  head(1) %>% 
  # Prepare labels
  mutate(Line_1 = paste0("Averaging ", round(Value_Average, 1), "k m³/day"),
         Line_2 = paste0("Contributing ", round(100 * Value_Percentage, 0), "% (avg.)"))
value_box_value <- value_box_data$Region
value_box_tag_1 <- value_box_data$Line_1
value_box_tag_2 <- value_box_data$Line_2

# Prepare showcase plot
value_box_plot <- Production$Crude_Oil$C5_plus %>% 
  filter(Region == value_box_data$Region) %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = Year, y = Value, group = Scenario,
             col = Scenario, fill = Scenario,
             ymin = pmin(0, Value), ymax = pmax(0, Value))) +
  geom_ribbon(col = NULL, fill = "#AAA", alpha = 0.1) +
  geom_line(aes(text = paste0(round(Value), ": ", Scenario, " (", Year, ")")),
            alpha = 0.25, lwd = 0.25) +
  scale_color_discrete(palette = c("#777", "#7e3434", "#256175")) +
  theme_void() +
  theme(legend.position = "none")
value_box_plot <- ggplotly(value_box_plot, tooltip = "text") %>%
  layout(plot_bgcolor = "rgba(1,1,1,0)", hovermode = "x",
         hoverlabel = list(font = list(family = "Onest", size = 13)),
         xaxis = list(fixedrange = TRUE), yaxis = list(fixedrange = TRUE)) %>%
  config(displayModeBar = F)

# Draw value box
value_box(theme = value_box_theme(bg = "#EEE", fg = "#777"),
        title = "Top contributor",
        showcase = value_box_plot,
        showcase_layout = "bottom",
        value = value_box_value,
        # tag("p", value_box_tag_1),
        tag("p", value_box_tag_2))
###

```

::::

:::: {.plotly-grid}

```{r}
# Main plot
Production$Crude_Oil$C5_plus %>%
  ridge_facet_plot(rp_X = Year, rp_Y = Value, rp_F1 = Scenario, rp_F2 = Region,
                   rp_title_main = "Canadian Crude Oil Production",
                   rp_title_Y = "Production", rp_unit_abbrev = "k m³/day",
                   rp_labs_Y = list(digits = 0, do_k = F, do_e = F),
                   rp_draw = list(points = F, peaks = T, medians = F,
                                  peaks_at = list(Y_min = F, Y_max = F,
                                                  X_values = c(2005, 2022, 2030, 2035, 2050))),
                   rp_alpha = list(ribbons = 0.35))
```

::::

:::

### Hydrogen {.tabset}

#### Total (calculated) {.tabset-leaf}

```{r}
#| include: false
Production$Hydrogen$Total_Calculated <- EF2023$hydrogen_production %>%
  filter(Unit == "Megatonnes") %>%
  summarize(Variable = "Total",
            Value = sum(Value),
            .by = c(Scenario, Region, Year)) %>% 
  mutate(Region = Region %>% factor %>% fct_recode(
    "AB" = "Alberta", "BC" = "British Columbia", "MB" = "Manitoba",
    "NB" = "New Brunswick", "NL" = "Newfoundland and Labrador",
    "NS" = "Nova Scotia", "NT" = "Northwest Territories",
    "NU" = "Nunavut", "ON" = "Ontario", "PE" = "Prince Edward Island",
    "QC" = "Quebec", "SK" = "Saskatchewan", "YT" = "Yukon",
    "Canada" = "Canada") %>% fct_relevel("Canada", after = 0),
    Scenario = Scenario %>% fct_relevel("Current Measures", after = 0),
    # Columns are added/ordered to reflect table structures in EF2023
    Unit = "Megatonnes", X = as.integer(NA)) %>% 
  select(X, Scenario, Unit, Region, Variable, Year, Value)
```

::: {.production-tab-column-grid}

:::: {.card-row-grid}

```{r}
### Card: Current Measures total (1/3)
v1 <- Production$Hydrogen$Total_Calculated %>%
  filter(Year > 2022,
         Region == "Canada",
         Scenario == "Current Measures") %>%
  pull(Value) %>%
  {sum(. * 1000000)}

value_box_value <- v1 %>%
  # rp_format_proper2(format = list(do_M = T)) %>% 
  rp_format_proper() %>% 
  paste0(" t")

value_box(theme = value_box_theme(bg = "#777", fg = "#EEE"),
        title = "Total (2023–2050)",
        value = value_box_value,
        tag("p", "Current measures (baseline)"))
###
```

```{r}
### Card: Canada Net-zero total (2/3)
v2 <- Production$Hydrogen$Total_Calculated %>%
  filter(Year > 2022,
         Region == "Canada",
         Scenario == "Canada Net-zero") %>%
  pull(Value) %>%
  {sum(. * 1000000)}

value_box_value <- v2 %>%
  # rp_format_proper2(format = list(do_M = T)) %>% 
  rp_format_proper() %>% 
  paste0(" t")

value_box(theme = value_box_theme(bg = "#7e3434", fg = "#EEE"),
        title = "Total (2023–2050)",
        value = value_box_value,
        tag("p", paste0("Canada Net-zero", " (",
                        switch(as.character(sign(v2-v1)),
                               "1" = "▲", "0" = "►", "-1" = "▼"),
                        round((v2/v1 - 1) * 100), "%)")))
###
```

```{r}
### Card: Global Net-zero total (3/3)
v3 <- Production$Hydrogen$Total_Calculated %>%
  filter(Year > 2022,
         Region == "Canada",
         Scenario == "Global Net-zero") %>%
  pull(Value) %>%
  {sum(. * 1000000)}

value_box_value <- v3 %>%
  # rp_format_proper2(format = list(do_M = T)) %>% 
  rp_format_proper() %>% 
  paste0(" t")

value_box(theme = value_box_theme(bg = "#256175", fg = "#EEE"),
        title = "Total (2023–2050)",
        value = value_box_value,
        tag("p", paste0("Global Net-zero", " (",
                        switch(as.character(sign(v3-v1)),
                               "1" = "▲", "0" = "►", "-1" = "▼"),
                        round((v3/v1 - 1) * 100), "%)")))
###
```

```{r}
### Card: Top contributor (Region)
# Get top contributor (Region)
value_box_data <- Production$Hydrogen$Total_Calculated %>%
  filter(Region != "Canada") %>%
  # Compute averages and contributions
  summarize(Value_Total = mean(Value),
            Value_Average = mean(Value),
            .by = Region) %>%
  mutate(Value_Percentage = Value_Total / sum(Value_Total)) %>% 
  # Get highest contribution
  arrange(desc(Value_Percentage)) %>%
  head(1) %>% 
  # Prepare labels
  mutate(Line_1 = paste0("Averaging ", round(Value_Average, 1), "Mt"),
         Line_2 = paste0("Contributing ", round(100 * Value_Percentage, 0), "% (avg.)"))
value_box_value <- value_box_data$Region
value_box_tag_1 <- value_box_data$Line_1
value_box_tag_2 <- value_box_data$Line_2

# Prepare showcase plot
value_box_plot <- Production$Hydrogen$Total_Calculated %>% 
  filter(Region == value_box_data$Region) %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = Year, y = Value, group = Scenario,
             col = Scenario, fill = Scenario,
             ymin = pmin(0, Value), ymax = pmax(0, Value))) +
  geom_ribbon(col = NULL, fill = "#AAA", alpha = 0.1) +
  geom_line(aes(text = paste0(round(Value, 1), ": ", Scenario, " (", Year, ")")),
            alpha = 0.25, lwd = 0.25) +
  scale_color_discrete(palette = c("#777", "#7e3434", "#256175")) +
  theme_void() +
  theme(legend.position = "none")
value_box_plot <- ggplotly(value_box_plot, tooltip = "text") %>%
  layout(plot_bgcolor = "rgba(1,1,1,0)", hovermode = "x",
         hoverlabel = list(font = list(family = "Onest", size = 13)),
         xaxis = list(fixedrange = TRUE), yaxis = list(fixedrange = TRUE)) %>%
  config(displayModeBar = F)

# Draw value box
value_box(theme = value_box_theme(bg = "#EEE", fg = "#777"),
        title = "Top contributor",
        showcase = value_box_plot,
        showcase_layout = "bottom",
        value = value_box_value,
        # tag("p", value_box_tag_1),
        tag("p", value_box_tag_2))
###

```

::::

:::: {.plotly-grid}

```{r}
# Main plot
Production$Hydrogen$Total_Calculated %>%
  ridge_facet_plot(rp_X = Year, rp_Y = Value, rp_F1 = Scenario, rp_F2 = Region,
                   rp_title_main = "Canadian Hydrogen Production",
                   rp_title_Y = "Production", rp_unit_abbrev = "Mt",
                   rp_labs_Y = list(digits = 1, do_k = F, do_e = F),
                   rp_draw = list(points = F, peaks = T, medians = F,
                                  peaks_at = list(Y_min = F, Y_max = F,
                                                  X_values = c(2010, 2022, 2030, 2035, 2050))),
                   rp_alpha = list(ribbons = 0.35))
```

::::

:::

#### Electrolysis {.tabset-leaf}

```{r}
#| include: false
Production$Hydrogen$Electrolysis <- EF2023$hydrogen_production %>%
  filter(Unit == "Megatonnes",
         Variable == "Electrolysis") %>%
  mutate(Region = Region %>% factor %>% fct_recode(
    "AB" = "Alberta", "BC" = "British Columbia", "MB" = "Manitoba",
    "NB" = "New Brunswick", "NL" = "Newfoundland and Labrador",
    "NS" = "Nova Scotia", "NT" = "Northwest Territories",
    "NU" = "Nunavut", "ON" = "Ontario", "PE" = "Prince Edward Island",
    "QC" = "Quebec", "SK" = "Saskatchewan", "YT" = "Yukon",
    "Canada" = "Canada") %>% fct_relevel("Canada", after = 0),
    Scenario = Scenario %>% fct_relevel("Current Measures", after = 0))
```

::: {.production-tab-column-grid}

:::: {.card-row-grid}

```{r}
### Card: Current Measures total (1/3)
v1 <- Production$Hydrogen$Electrolysis %>%
  filter(Year > 2022,
         Region == "Canada",
         Scenario == "Current Measures") %>%
  pull(Value) %>%
  {sum(. * 1000000)}

value_box_value <- v1 %>%
  # rp_format_proper2(format = list(do_M = T)) %>% 
  rp_format_proper() %>% 
  paste0(" t")

value_box(theme = value_box_theme(bg = "#777", fg = "#EEE"),
        title = "Total (2023–2050)",
        value = value_box_value,
        tag("p", "Current measures (baseline)"))
###
```

```{r}
### Card: Canada Net-zero total (2/3)
v2 <- Production$Hydrogen$Electrolysis %>%
  filter(Year > 2022,
         Region == "Canada",
         Scenario == "Canada Net-zero") %>%
  pull(Value) %>%
  {sum(. * 1000000)}

value_box_value <- v2 %>%
  # rp_format_proper2(format = list(do_M = T)) %>% 
  rp_format_proper() %>% 
  paste0(" t")

value_box(theme = value_box_theme(bg = "#7e3434", fg = "#EEE"),
        title = "Total (2023–2050)",
        value = value_box_value,
        tag("p", paste0("Canada Net-zero", " (",
                        switch(as.character(sign(v2-v1)),
                               "1" = "▲", "0" = "►", "-1" = "▼"),
                        round((v2/v1 - 1) * 100), "%)")))
###
```

```{r}
### Card: Global Net-zero total (3/3)
v3 <- Production$Hydrogen$Electrolysis %>%
  filter(Year > 2022,
         Region == "Canada",
         Scenario == "Global Net-zero") %>%
  pull(Value) %>%
  {sum(. * 1000000)}

value_box_value <- v3 %>%
  # rp_format_proper2(format = list(do_M = T)) %>% 
  rp_format_proper() %>% 
  paste0(" t")

value_box(theme = value_box_theme(bg = "#256175", fg = "#EEE"),
        title = "Total (2023–2050)",
        value = value_box_value,
        tag("p", paste0("Global Net-zero", " (",
                        switch(as.character(sign(v3-v1)),
                               "1" = "▲", "0" = "►", "-1" = "▼"),
                        round((v3/v1 - 1) * 100), "%)")))
###
```

```{r}
### Card: Top contributor (Region)
# Get top contributor (Region)
value_box_data <- Production$Hydrogen$Electrolysis %>%
  filter(Region != "Canada") %>%
  # Compute averages and contributions
  summarize(Value_Total = mean(Value),
            Value_Average = mean(Value),
            .by = Region) %>%
  mutate(Value_Percentage = Value_Total / sum(Value_Total)) %>% 
  # Get highest contribution
  arrange(desc(Value_Percentage)) %>%
  head(1) %>% 
  # Prepare labels
  mutate(Line_1 = paste0("Averaging ", round(Value_Average, 1), "Mt"),
         Line_2 = paste0("Contributing ", round(100 * Value_Percentage, 0), "% (avg.)"))
value_box_value <- value_box_data$Region
value_box_tag_1 <- value_box_data$Line_1
value_box_tag_2 <- value_box_data$Line_2

# Prepare showcase plot
value_box_plot <- Production$Hydrogen$Electrolysis %>% 
  filter(Region == value_box_data$Region) %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = Year, y = Value, group = Scenario,
             col = Scenario, fill = Scenario,
             ymin = pmin(0, Value), ymax = pmax(0, Value))) +
  geom_ribbon(col = NULL, fill = "#AAA", alpha = 0.1) +
  geom_line(aes(text = paste0(round(Value, 1), ": ", Scenario, " (", Year, ")")),
            alpha = 0.25, lwd = 0.25) +
  scale_color_discrete(palette = c("#777", "#7e3434", "#256175")) +
  theme_void() +
  theme(legend.position = "none")
value_box_plot <- ggplotly(value_box_plot, tooltip = "text") %>%
  layout(plot_bgcolor = "rgba(1,1,1,0)", hovermode = "x",
         hoverlabel = list(font = list(family = "Onest", size = 13)),
         xaxis = list(fixedrange = TRUE), yaxis = list(fixedrange = TRUE)) %>%
  config(displayModeBar = F)

# Draw value box
value_box(theme = value_box_theme(bg = "#EEE", fg = "#777"),
        title = "Top contributor",
        showcase = value_box_plot,
        showcase_layout = "bottom",
        value = value_box_value,
        # tag("p", value_box_tag_1),
        tag("p", value_box_tag_2))
###

```

::::

:::: {.plotly-grid}

```{r}
# Main plot
Production$Hydrogen$Electrolysis %>%
  ridge_facet_plot(rp_X = Year, rp_Y = Value, rp_F1 = Scenario, rp_F2 = Region,
                   rp_title_main = "Canadian Hydrogen Production",
                   rp_title_Y = "Production", rp_unit_abbrev = "Mt",
                   rp_labs_Y = list(digits = 1, do_k = F, do_e = F),
                   rp_draw = list(points = F, peaks = T, medians = F,
                                  peaks_at = list(Y_min = F, Y_max = F,
                                                  X_values = c(2010, 2022, 2030, 2035, 2050))),
                   rp_alpha = list(ribbons = 0.35))
```

::::

:::

#### Natural gas with CCS {.tabset-leaf}

```{r}
#| include: false
Production$Hydrogen$Natural_Gas_With_CCS <- EF2023$hydrogen_production %>%
  filter(Unit == "Megatonnes",
         Variable == "Natural gas with CCS") %>%
  mutate(Region = Region %>% factor %>% fct_recode(
    "AB" = "Alberta", "BC" = "British Columbia", "MB" = "Manitoba",
    "NB" = "New Brunswick", "NL" = "Newfoundland and Labrador",
    "NS" = "Nova Scotia", "NT" = "Northwest Territories",
    "NU" = "Nunavut", "ON" = "Ontario", "PE" = "Prince Edward Island",
    "QC" = "Quebec", "SK" = "Saskatchewan", "YT" = "Yukon",
    "Canada" = "Canada") %>% fct_relevel("Canada", after = 0),
    Scenario = Scenario %>% fct_relevel("Current Measures", after = 0))
```

::: {.production-tab-column-grid}

:::: {.card-row-grid}

```{r}
### Card: Current Measures total (1/3)
v1 <- Production$Hydrogen$Natural_Gas_With_CCS %>%
  filter(Year > 2022,
         Region == "Canada",
         Scenario == "Current Measures") %>%
  pull(Value) %>%
  {sum(. * 1000000)}

value_box_value <- v1 %>%
  # rp_format_proper2(format = list(do_M = T)) %>% 
  rp_format_proper() %>% 
  paste0(" t")

value_box(theme = value_box_theme(bg = "#777", fg = "#EEE"),
        title = "Total (2023–2050)",
        value = value_box_value,
        tag("p", "Current measures (baseline)"))
###
```

```{r}
### Card: Canada Net-zero total (2/3)
v2 <- Production$Hydrogen$Natural_Gas_With_CCS %>%
  filter(Year > 2022,
         Region == "Canada",
         Scenario == "Canada Net-zero") %>%
  pull(Value) %>%
  {sum(. * 1000000)}

value_box_value <- v2 %>%
  # rp_format_proper2(format = list(do_M = T)) %>% 
  rp_format_proper() %>% 
  paste0(" t")

value_box(theme = value_box_theme(bg = "#7e3434", fg = "#EEE"),
        title = "Total (2023–2050)",
        value = value_box_value,
        tag("p", paste0("Canada Net-zero", " (",
                        switch(as.character(sign(v2-v1)),
                               "1" = "▲", "0" = "►", "-1" = "▼"),
                        round((v2/v1 - 1) * 100), "%)")))
###
```

```{r}
### Card: Global Net-zero total (3/3)
v3 <- Production$Hydrogen$Natural_Gas_With_CCS %>%
  filter(Year > 2022,
         Region == "Canada",
         Scenario == "Global Net-zero") %>%
  pull(Value) %>%
  {sum(. * 1000000)}

value_box_value <- v3 %>%
  # rp_format_proper2(format = list(do_M = T)) %>% 
  rp_format_proper() %>% 
  paste0(" t")

value_box(theme = value_box_theme(bg = "#256175", fg = "#EEE"),
        title = "Total (2023–2050)",
        value = value_box_value,
        tag("p", paste0("Global Net-zero", " (",
                        switch(as.character(sign(v3-v1)),
                               "1" = "▲", "0" = "►", "-1" = "▼"),
                        round((v3/v1 - 1) * 100), "%)")))
###
```

```{r}
### Card: Top contributor (Region)
# Get top contributor (Region)
value_box_data <- Production$Hydrogen$Natural_Gas_With_CCS %>%
  filter(Region != "Canada") %>%
  # Compute averages and contributions
  summarize(Value_Total = mean(Value),
            Value_Average = mean(Value),
            .by = Region) %>%
  mutate(Value_Percentage = Value_Total / sum(Value_Total)) %>% 
  # Get highest contribution
  arrange(desc(Value_Percentage)) %>%
  head(1) %>% 
  # Prepare labels
  mutate(Line_1 = paste0("Averaging ", round(Value_Average, 1), "Mt"),
         Line_2 = paste0("Contributing ", round(100 * Value_Percentage, 0), "% (avg.)"))
value_box_value <- value_box_data$Region
value_box_tag_1 <- value_box_data$Line_1
value_box_tag_2 <- value_box_data$Line_2

# Prepare showcase plot
value_box_plot <- Production$Hydrogen$Natural_Gas_With_CCS %>% 
  filter(Region == value_box_data$Region) %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = Year, y = Value, group = Scenario,
             col = Scenario, fill = Scenario,
             ymin = pmin(0, Value), ymax = pmax(0, Value))) +
  geom_ribbon(col = NULL, fill = "#AAA", alpha = 0.1) +
  geom_line(aes(text = paste0(round(Value, 1), ": ", Scenario, " (", Year, ")")),
            alpha = 0.25, lwd = 0.25) +
  scale_color_discrete(palette = c("#777", "#7e3434", "#256175")) +
  theme_void() +
  theme(legend.position = "none")
value_box_plot <- ggplotly(value_box_plot, tooltip = "text") %>%
  layout(plot_bgcolor = "rgba(1,1,1,0)", hovermode = "x",
         hoverlabel = list(font = list(family = "Onest", size = 13)),
         xaxis = list(fixedrange = TRUE), yaxis = list(fixedrange = TRUE)) %>%
  config(displayModeBar = F)

# Draw value box
value_box(theme = value_box_theme(bg = "#EEE", fg = "#777"),
        title = "Top contributor",
        showcase = value_box_plot,
        showcase_layout = "bottom",
        value = value_box_value,
        # tag("p", value_box_tag_1),
        tag("p", value_box_tag_2))
###

```

::::

:::: {.plotly-grid}

```{r}
# Main plot
Production$Hydrogen$Natural_Gas_With_CCS %>%
  ridge_facet_plot(rp_X = Year, rp_Y = Value, rp_F1 = Scenario, rp_F2 = Region,
                   rp_title_main = "Canadian Hydrogen Production",
                   rp_title_Y = "Production", rp_unit_abbrev = "Mt",
                   rp_labs_Y = list(digits = 1, do_k = F, do_e = F),
                   rp_draw = list(points = F, peaks = T, medians = F,
                                  peaks_at = list(Y_min = F, Y_max = F,
                                                  X_values = c(2010, 2022, 2030, 2035, 2050))),
                   rp_alpha = list(ribbons = 0.35))
```

::::

:::

#### Biomass {.tabset-leaf}

```{r}
#| include: false
Production$Hydrogen$Biomass <- EF2023$hydrogen_production %>%
  filter(Unit == "Megatonnes",
         Variable == "Biomass") %>%
  mutate(Region = Region %>% factor %>% fct_recode(
    "AB" = "Alberta", "BC" = "British Columbia", "MB" = "Manitoba",
    "NB" = "New Brunswick", "NL" = "Newfoundland and Labrador",
    "NS" = "Nova Scotia", "NT" = "Northwest Territories",
    "NU" = "Nunavut", "ON" = "Ontario", "PE" = "Prince Edward Island",
    "QC" = "Quebec", "SK" = "Saskatchewan", "YT" = "Yukon",
    "Canada" = "Canada") %>% fct_relevel("Canada", after = 0),
    Scenario = Scenario %>% fct_relevel("Current Measures", after = 0))
```

::: {.production-tab-column-grid}

:::: {.card-row-grid}

```{r}
### Card: Current Measures total (1/3)
v1 <- Production$Hydrogen$Biomass %>%
  filter(Year > 2022,
         Region == "Canada",
         Scenario == "Current Measures") %>%
  pull(Value) %>%
  {sum(. * 1000000)}

value_box_value <- v1 %>%
  # rp_format_proper2(format = list(do_M = T)) %>% 
  rp_format_proper() %>% 
  paste0(" t")

value_box(theme = value_box_theme(bg = "#777", fg = "#EEE"),
        title = "Total (2023–2050)",
        value = value_box_value,
        tag("p", "Current measures (baseline)"))
###
```

```{r}
### Card: Canada Net-zero total (2/3)
v2 <- Production$Hydrogen$Biomass %>%
  filter(Year > 2022,
         Region == "Canada",
         Scenario == "Canada Net-zero") %>%
  pull(Value) %>%
  {sum(. * 1000000)}

value_box_value <- v2 %>%
  # rp_format_proper2(format = list(do_M = T)) %>% 
  rp_format_proper() %>% 
  paste0(" t")

value_box(theme = value_box_theme(bg = "#7e3434", fg = "#EEE"),
        title = "Total (2023–2050)",
        value = value_box_value,
        tag("p", paste0("Canada Net-zero", " (",
                        switch(as.character(sign(v2-v1)),
                               "1" = "▲", "0" = "►", "-1" = "▼"),
                        round((v2/v1 - 1) * 100), "%)")))
###
```

```{r}
### Card: Global Net-zero total (3/3)
v3 <- Production$Hydrogen$Biomass %>%
  filter(Year > 2022,
         Region == "Canada",
         Scenario == "Global Net-zero") %>%
  pull(Value) %>%
  {sum(. * 1000000)}

value_box_value <- v3 %>%
  # rp_format_proper2(format = list(do_M = T)) %>%
  rp_format_proper() %>% 
  paste0(" t")

value_box(theme = value_box_theme(bg = "#256175", fg = "#EEE"),
        title = "Total (2023–2050)",
        value = value_box_value,
        tag("p", paste0("Global Net-zero", " (",
                        switch(as.character(sign(v3-v1)),
                               "1" = "▲", "0" = "►", "-1" = "▼"),
                        round((v3/v1 - 1) * 100), "%)")))
###
```

```{r}
### Card: Top contributor (Region)
# Get top contributor (Region)
value_box_data <- Production$Hydrogen$Biomass %>%
  filter(Region != "Canada") %>%
  # Compute averages and contributions
  summarize(Value_Total = mean(Value),
            Value_Average = mean(Value),
            .by = Region) %>%
  mutate(Value_Percentage = Value_Total / sum(Value_Total)) %>% 
  # Get highest contribution
  arrange(desc(Value_Percentage)) %>%
  head(1) %>% 
  # Prepare labels
  mutate(Line_1 = paste0("Averaging ", round(Value_Average, 1), "Mt"),
         Line_2 = paste0("Contributing ", round(100 * Value_Percentage, 0), "% (avg.)"))
value_box_value <- value_box_data$Region
value_box_tag_1 <- value_box_data$Line_1
value_box_tag_2 <- value_box_data$Line_2

# Prepare showcase plot
value_box_plot <- Production$Hydrogen$Biomass %>% 
  filter(Region == value_box_data$Region) %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = Year, y = Value, group = Scenario,
             col = Scenario, fill = Scenario,
             ymin = pmin(0, Value), ymax = pmax(0, Value))) +
  geom_ribbon(col = NULL, fill = "#AAA", alpha = 0.1) +
  geom_line(aes(text = paste0(round(Value, 1), ": ", Scenario, " (", Year, ")")),
            alpha = 0.25, lwd = 0.25) +
  scale_color_discrete(palette = c("#777", "#7e3434", "#256175")) +
  theme_void() +
  theme(legend.position = "none")
value_box_plot <- ggplotly(value_box_plot, tooltip = "text") %>%
  layout(plot_bgcolor = "rgba(1,1,1,0)", hovermode = "x",
         hoverlabel = list(font = list(family = "Onest", size = 13)),
         xaxis = list(fixedrange = TRUE), yaxis = list(fixedrange = TRUE)) %>%
  config(displayModeBar = F)

# Draw value box
value_box(theme = value_box_theme(bg = "#EEE", fg = "#777"),
        title = "Top contributor",
        showcase = value_box_plot,
        showcase_layout = "bottom",
        value = value_box_value,
        # tag("p", value_box_tag_1),
        tag("p", value_box_tag_2))
###

```

::::

:::: {.plotly-grid}

```{r}
# Main plot
Production$Hydrogen$Biomass %>%
  ridge_facet_plot(rp_X = Year, rp_Y = Value, rp_F1 = Scenario, rp_F2 = Region,
                   rp_title_main = "Canadian Hydrogen Production",
                   rp_title_Y = "Production", rp_unit_abbrev = "Mt",
                   rp_labs_Y = list(digits = 1, do_k = F, do_e = F),
                   rp_draw = list(points = F, peaks = T, medians = F,
                                  peaks_at = list(Y_min = F, Y_max = F,
                                                  X_values = c(2010, 2022, 2030, 2035, 2050))),
                   rp_alpha = list(ribbons = 0.35))
```

::::

:::

### Natural Gas {.tabset}

#### Total {.tabset-leaf}

```{r}
#| include: false
Production$Natural_Gas$Total <- EF2023$natural_gas_production %>%
  filter(Unit == "Million Cubic Metres per day",
         Variable == "Total",
         Region != "Western Canadian Sedimentary Basin") %>%
  mutate(Region = Region %>% factor %>% fct_recode(
    "AB" = "Alberta", "BC" = "British Columbia", "MB" = "Manitoba",
    "NB" = "New Brunswick", "NL" = "Newfoundland and Labrador",
    "NS" = "Nova Scotia", "NT" = "Northwest Territories",
    "NU" = "Nunavut", "ON" = "Ontario", "PE" = "Prince Edward Island",
    "QC" = "Quebec", "SK" = "Saskatchewan", "YT" = "Yukon",
    "Canada" = "Canada") %>% fct_relevel("Canada", after = 0),
    Scenario = Scenario %>% fct_relevel("Current Measures", after = 0))
```

::: {.production-tab-column-grid}

:::: {.card-row-grid}

```{r}
### Card: Current Measures total (1/3)
v1 <- Production$Natural_Gas$Total %>%
  filter(Year > 2022,
         Region != "Canada",
         Scenario == "Current Measures") %>%
  pull(Value) %>%
  {sum(. * 365.24) * 1000000}

value_box_value <- v1 %>%
  # rp_format_proper2(format = list(do_B = T)) %>%
  rp_format_proper() %>% 
  paste0(" m³")

value_box(theme = value_box_theme(bg = "#777", fg = "#EEE"),
        title = "Total (2023–2050)",
        value = value_box_value,
        tag("p", "Current measures (baseline)"))
###
```

```{r}
### Card: Canada Net-zero total (2/3)
v2 <- Production$Natural_Gas$Total %>%
  filter(Year > 2022,
         Region != "Canada",
         Scenario == "Canada Net-zero") %>%
  pull(Value) %>%
  {sum(. * 365.24) * 1000000}

value_box_value <- v2 %>%
  # rp_format_proper2(format = list(do_B = T)) %>% 
  rp_format_proper() %>% 
  paste0(" m³")

value_box(theme = value_box_theme(bg = "#7e3434", fg = "#EEE"),
        title = "Total (2023–2050)",
        value = value_box_value,
        tag("p", paste0("Canada Net-zero", " (",
                        switch(as.character(sign(v2-v1)),
                               "1" = "▲", "0" = "►", "-1" = "▼"),
                        round((v2/v1 - 1) * 100), "%)")))
###
```

```{r}
### Card: Global Net-zero total (3/3)
v3 <- Production$Natural_Gas$Total %>%
  filter(Year > 2022,
         Region != "Canada",
         Scenario == "Global Net-zero") %>%
  pull(Value) %>%
  {sum(. * 365.24) * 1000000}

value_box_value <- v3 %>%
  # rp_format_proper2(format = list(do_B = T)) %>% 
  rp_format_proper() %>% 
  paste0(" m³")

value_box(theme = value_box_theme(bg = "#256175", fg = "#EEE"),
        title = "Total (2023–2050)",
        value = value_box_value,
        tag("p", paste0("Global Net-zero", " (",
                        switch(as.character(sign(v3-v1)),
                               "1" = "▲", "0" = "►", "-1" = "▼"),
                        round((v3/v1 - 1) * 100), "%)")))
###
```

```{r}
### Card: Top contributor (Region)
# Get top contributor (Region)
value_box_data <- Production$Natural_Gas$Total %>%
  filter(Region != "Canada") %>%
  # Compute averages and contributions
  summarize(Value_Total = mean(Value),
            Value_Average = mean(Value),
            .by = Region) %>%
  mutate(Value_Percentage = Value_Total / sum(Value_Total)) %>% 
  # Get highest contribution
  arrange(desc(Value_Percentage)) %>%
  head(1) %>% 
  # Prepare labels
  mutate(Line_1 = paste0("Averaging ", round(Value_Average, 1), "M m³/day"),
         Line_2 = paste0("Contributing ", round(100 * Value_Percentage, 0), "% (avg.)"))
value_box_value <- value_box_data$Region
value_box_tag_1 <- value_box_data$Line_1
value_box_tag_2 <- value_box_data$Line_2

# Prepare showcase plot
value_box_plot <- Production$Natural_Gas$Total %>% 
  filter(Region == value_box_data$Region) %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = Year, y = Value, group = Scenario,
             col = Scenario, fill = Scenario,
             ymin = pmin(0, Value), ymax = pmax(0, Value))) +
  geom_ribbon(col = NULL, fill = "#AAA", alpha = 0.1) +
  geom_line(aes(text = paste0(round(Value, 1), ": ", Scenario, " (", Year, ")")),
            alpha = 0.25, lwd = 0.25) +
  scale_color_discrete(palette = c("#777", "#7e3434", "#256175")) +
  theme_void() +
  theme(legend.position = "none")
value_box_plot <- ggplotly(value_box_plot, tooltip = "text") %>%
  layout(plot_bgcolor = "rgba(1,1,1,0)", hovermode = "x",
         hoverlabel = list(font = list(family = "Onest", size = 13)),
         xaxis = list(fixedrange = TRUE), yaxis = list(fixedrange = TRUE)) %>%
  config(displayModeBar = F)

# Draw value box
value_box(theme = value_box_theme(bg = "#EEE", fg = "#777"),
        title = "Top contributor",
        showcase = value_box_plot,
        showcase_layout = "bottom",
        value = value_box_value,
        # tag("p", value_box_tag_1),
        tag("p", value_box_tag_2))
###

```

::::

:::: {.plotly-grid}

```{r}
# Main plot
Production$Natural_Gas$Total %>%
  ridge_facet_plot(rp_X = Year, rp_Y = Value, rp_F1 = Scenario, rp_F2 = Region,
                   rp_title_main = "Canadian Natural Gas Production",
                   rp_title_Y = "Production", rp_unit_abbrev = "M m³/day",
                   rp_labs_Y = list(digits = 1, do_k = F, do_e = F),
                   rp_draw = list(points = F, peaks = T, medians = F,
                                  peaks_at = list(Y_min = F, Y_max = F,
                                                  X_values = c(2005, 2022, 2030, 2035, 2050))),
                   rp_alpha = list(ribbons = 0.35))
```

::::

:::

#### Tight {.tabset-leaf}

```{r}
#| include: false
Production$Natural_Gas$Tight <- EF2023$natural_gas_production %>%
  filter(Unit == "Million Cubic Metres per day",
         Variable == "Tight",
         Region != "Western Canadian Sedimentary Basin") %>%
  mutate(Region = Region %>% factor %>% fct_recode(
    "AB" = "Alberta", "BC" = "British Columbia", "MB" = "Manitoba",
    "NB" = "New Brunswick", "NL" = "Newfoundland and Labrador",
    "NS" = "Nova Scotia", "NT" = "Northwest Territories",
    "NU" = "Nunavut", "ON" = "Ontario", "PE" = "Prince Edward Island",
    "QC" = "Quebec", "SK" = "Saskatchewan", "YT" = "Yukon",
    "Canada" = "Canada") %>% fct_relevel("Canada", after = 0),
    Scenario = Scenario %>% fct_relevel("Current Measures", after = 0))
```

::: {.production-tab-column-grid}

:::: {.card-row-grid}

```{r}
### Card: Current Measures total (1/3)
v1 <- Production$Natural_Gas$Tight %>%
  filter(Year > 2022,
         Region != "Canada",
         Scenario == "Current Measures") %>%
  pull(Value) %>%
  {sum(. * 365.24) * 1000000}

value_box_value <- v1 %>%
  # rp_format_proper2(format = list(do_B = T)) %>% 
  rp_format_proper() %>% 
  paste0(" m³")

value_box(theme = value_box_theme(bg = "#777", fg = "#EEE"),
        title = "Total (2023–2050)",
        value = value_box_value,
        tag("p", "Current measures (baseline)"))
###
```

```{r}
### Card: Canada Net-zero total (2/3)
v2 <- Production$Natural_Gas$Tight %>%
  filter(Year > 2022,
         Region != "Canada",
         Scenario == "Canada Net-zero") %>%
  pull(Value) %>%
  {sum(. * 365.24) * 1000000}

value_box_value <- v2 %>%
  # rp_format_proper2(format = list(do_B = T)) %>% 
  rp_format_proper() %>% 
  paste0(" m³")

value_box(theme = value_box_theme(bg = "#7e3434", fg = "#EEE"),
        title = "Total (2023–2050)",
        value = value_box_value,
        tag("p", paste0("Canada Net-zero", " (",
                        switch(as.character(sign(v2-v1)),
                               "1" = "▲", "0" = "►", "-1" = "▼"),
                        round((v2/v1 - 1) * 100), "%)")))
###
```

```{r}
### Card: Global Net-zero total (3/3)
v3 <- Production$Natural_Gas$Tight %>%
  filter(Year > 2022,
         Region != "Canada",
         Scenario == "Global Net-zero") %>%
  pull(Value) %>%
  {sum(. * 365.24) * 1000000}

value_box_value <- v3 %>%
  # rp_format_proper2(format = list(do_B = T)) %>% 
  rp_format_proper() %>% 
  paste0(" m³")

value_box(theme = value_box_theme(bg = "#256175", fg = "#EEE"),
        title = "Total (2023–2050)",
        value = value_box_value,
        tag("p", paste0("Global Net-zero", " (",
                        switch(as.character(sign(v3-v1)),
                               "1" = "▲", "0" = "►", "-1" = "▼"),
                        round((v3/v1 - 1) * 100), "%)")))
###
```

```{r}
### Card: Top contributor (Region)
# Get top contributor (Region)
value_box_data <- Production$Natural_Gas$Tight %>%
  filter(Region != "Canada") %>%
  # Compute averages and contributions
  summarize(Value_Total = mean(Value),
            Value_Average = mean(Value),
            .by = Region) %>%
  mutate(Value_Percentage = Value_Total / sum(Value_Total)) %>% 
  # Get highest contribution
  arrange(desc(Value_Percentage)) %>%
  head(1) %>% 
  # Prepare labels
  mutate(Line_1 = paste0("Averaging ", round(Value_Average, 1), "M m³/day"),
         Line_2 = paste0("Contributing ", round(100 * Value_Percentage, 0), "% (avg.)"))
value_box_value <- value_box_data$Region
value_box_tag_1 <- value_box_data$Line_1
value_box_tag_2 <- value_box_data$Line_2

# Prepare showcase plot
value_box_plot <- Production$Natural_Gas$Tight %>% 
  filter(Region == value_box_data$Region) %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = Year, y = Value, group = Scenario,
             col = Scenario, fill = Scenario,
             ymin = pmin(0, Value), ymax = pmax(0, Value))) +
  geom_ribbon(col = NULL, fill = "#AAA", alpha = 0.1) +
  geom_line(aes(text = paste0(round(Value, 1), ": ", Scenario, " (", Year, ")")),
            alpha = 0.25, lwd = 0.25) +
  scale_color_discrete(palette = c("#777", "#7e3434", "#256175")) +
  theme_void() +
  theme(legend.position = "none")
value_box_plot <- ggplotly(value_box_plot, tooltip = "text") %>%
  layout(plot_bgcolor = "rgba(1,1,1,0)", hovermode = "x",
         hoverlabel = list(font = list(family = "Onest", size = 13)),
         xaxis = list(fixedrange = TRUE), yaxis = list(fixedrange = TRUE)) %>%
  config(displayModeBar = F)

# Draw value box
value_box(theme = value_box_theme(bg = "#EEE", fg = "#777"),
        title = "Top contributor",
        showcase = value_box_plot,
        showcase_layout = "bottom",
        value = value_box_value,
        # tag("p", value_box_tag_1),
        tag("p", value_box_tag_2))
###

```

::::

:::: {.plotly-grid}

```{r}
# Main plot
Production$Natural_Gas$Tight %>%
  ridge_facet_plot(rp_X = Year, rp_Y = Value, rp_F1 = Scenario, rp_F2 = Region,
                   rp_title_main = "Canadian Natural Gas Production",
                   rp_title_Y = "Production", rp_unit_abbrev = "M m³/day",
                   rp_labs_Y = list(digits = 1, do_k = F, do_e = F),
                   rp_draw = list(points = F, peaks = T, medians = F,
                                  peaks_at = list(Y_min = F, Y_max = F,
                                                  X_values = c(2005, 2022, 2030, 2035, 2050))),
                   rp_alpha = list(ribbons = 0.35))
```

::::

:::

#### Solution {.tabset-leaf}

```{r}
#| include: false
Production$Natural_Gas$Solution <- EF2023$natural_gas_production %>%
  filter(Unit == "Million Cubic Metres per day",
         Variable == "Solution",
         Region != "Western Canadian Sedimentary Basin") %>%
  mutate(Region = Region %>% factor %>% fct_recode(
    "AB" = "Alberta", "BC" = "British Columbia", "MB" = "Manitoba",
    "NB" = "New Brunswick", "NL" = "Newfoundland and Labrador",
    "NS" = "Nova Scotia", "NT" = "Northwest Territories",
    "NU" = "Nunavut", "ON" = "Ontario", "PE" = "Prince Edward Island",
    "QC" = "Quebec", "SK" = "Saskatchewan", "YT" = "Yukon",
    "Canada" = "Canada") %>% fct_relevel("Canada", after = 0),
    Scenario = Scenario %>% fct_relevel("Current Measures", after = 0))
```

::: {.production-tab-column-grid}

:::: {.card-row-grid}

```{r}
### Card: Current Measures total (1/3)
v1 <- Production$Natural_Gas$Solution %>%
  filter(Year > 2022,
         Region != "Canada",
         Scenario == "Current Measures") %>%
  pull(Value) %>%
  {sum(. * 365.24) * 1000000}

value_box_value <- v1 %>%
  # rp_format_proper2(format = list(do_B = T)) %>% 
  rp_format_proper() %>% 
  paste0(" m³")

value_box(theme = value_box_theme(bg = "#777", fg = "#EEE"),
        title = "Total (2023–2050)",
        value = value_box_value,
        tag("p", "Current measures (baseline)"))
###
```

```{r}
### Card: Canada Net-zero total (2/3)
v2 <- Production$Natural_Gas$Solution %>%
  filter(Year > 2022,
         # Region != "Canada",
         Scenario == "Canada Net-zero") %>%
  pull(Value) %>%
  {sum(. * 365.24) * 1000000}

value_box_value <- v2 %>%
  # rp_format_proper2(format = list(do_B = T)) %>% 
  rp_format_proper() %>% 
  paste0(" m³")

value_box(theme = value_box_theme(bg = "#7e3434", fg = "#EEE"),
        title = "Total (2023–2050)",
        value = value_box_value,
        tag("p", paste0("Canada Net-zero", " (",
                        switch(as.character(sign(v2-v1)),
                               "1" = "▲", "0" = "►", "-1" = "▼"),
                        round((v2/v1 - 1) * 100), "%)")))
###
```

```{r}
### Card: Global Net-zero total (3/3)
v3 <- Production$Natural_Gas$Solution %>%
  filter(Year > 2022,
         Region != "Canada",
         Scenario == "Global Net-zero") %>%
  pull(Value) %>%
  {sum(. * 365.24) * 1000000}

value_box_value <- v3 %>%
  # rp_format_proper2(format = list(do_B = T)) %>% 
  rp_format_proper() %>% 
  paste0(" m³")

value_box(theme = value_box_theme(bg = "#256175", fg = "#EEE"),
        title = "Total (2023–2050)",
        value = value_box_value,
```
